name: Market Downturn Revenue Impact
short_description: Calculates the new revenue after a market downturn reduces the initial revenue by a specified percentage.

inputs.name: initial_revenue
inputs.description: The company's revenue before the market downturn.

inputs.name: downturn
inputs.description: The percentage decrease in revenue due to the market downturn.

name: Operating Cost Increase Scenario
short_description: Calculates the new operating cost after a percentage increase.

inputs.name: increase
inputs.description: The percentage increase in operating costs (e.g., 10 for 10%)

name: Revenue Recovery Effect
short_description: Calculates the new revenue after an initial revenue experiences a downturn followed by a recovery.

inputs.name: downturn
inputs.description: The percentage decrease in revenue during the downturn.

inputs.name: recovery
inputs.description: The percentage increase in revenue during the recovery.

name: Interest Rate Impact on Financing Cost
short_description: Calculates the additional financing cost incurred when interest rates increase, accounting for a specific sensitivity factor.

inputs.name: loan_amount
inputs.description: The principal amount of the outstanding loan.

inputs.name: rate_change
inputs.description: The percentage increase in interest rates (e.g., 0.5 for a 0.5% increase).

inputs.name: sensitivity
inputs.description: A factor indicating how sensitive the financing cost is to interest rate changes.

name: Multi-factor Investment Scenario Planning
short_description: Calculates the change in investment value based on multiple factor changes (market, interest, inflation) and their respective sensitivities.

inputs.name: initial_investment
inputs.description: The initial value of the investment.

inputs.name: market_sens
inputs.description: Sensitivity of the investment to market changes.

inputs.name: interest_sens
inputs.description: Sensitivity of the investment to interest rate changes.

inputs.name: inflation_sens
inputs.description: Sensitivity of the investment to inflation changes.
